caption: A person wearing a pink sleeveless top and black shorts is in an indoor basketball gym featuring blue padded walls, a wooden floor, and a basketball hoop with a transparent backboard. In the sequence, the person begins by jumping high into the air with arms extended upward toward the hoop. They reach the peak of their jump, extending their right arm to touch the rim of the basket. After descending, the person lands on the court and stands still. A second person, wearing a similar pink sleeveless top and black shorts, enters the scene and stands behind the first person, watching as they recover from the jump. The background remains constant, showing tiered blue seating and a white brick wall. There is no visible on-screen text or logos.
